assumptions.implementation_obligation: select concrete primitives and encodings that preserve symbolic distinctions
assumptions.name: symbolic cryptographic abstraction

assumptions.implementation_obligation: use collision-resistant hashing, canonical serialization, and domain separation
assumptions.name: collision-free constructor behavior in the symbolic model

assumptions.implementation_obligation: inventory all production authorities and compromise paths
assumptions.name: declared key roles and compromise events are complete

assumptions.implementation_obligation: provide trustworthy ordering, checkpoints, or monotonic state
assumptions.name: security-relevant event order is preserved

assumptions.implementation_obligation: implement auditable key destruction across memory, backups, and recovery systems
assumptions.name: modeled prior epoch keys are erased

assumptions.implementation_obligation: define and audit physical, legal, hardware, or blockchain evidence profiles
assumptions.name: external evidence satisfies the modeled Oracle predicate

assumptions.implementation_obligation: prove or audit event mapping, serialization, state transitions, and bypass absence
assumptions.name: implementation acceptance behavior refines the model
external ledger evidence satisfies a declared finality rule

not_established: physical truth of all Oracle inputs
end-to-end refinement of all components into C6B
